## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::MessageSquareHeart;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        MessageSquareHeart { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
comment, chat, conversation, dialog, feedback, positive, like, love, interest, valentine, dating, date, speech bubble

## Categories
social
